title: Tangy Velvety Irish Lettuce Soup
description: A light, tangy, and velvety soup that showcases baby lettuce leaves in a bright lemon‑herb broth, perfect for a quick Paleo‑friendly lunch.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and sauté until translucent, about 4 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic and cook 30 seconds until fragrant.
Pour in the vegetable broth, bring to a gentle simmer, then add the lemon juice and fresh dill.
Add the baby lettuce leaves, cover, and let the soup simmer for 8–10 minutes until the lettuce is tender.
Remove from heat and blend the soup until completely smooth using an immersion blender or a countertop blender in batches.
Return the soup to the pot, stir in the coconut milk, and reheat just until warmed through (do not boil).
Season with salt and pepper to taste, then serve hot, garnished with extra dill if desired.
